text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Vodka has many victories
snatched under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! There's a time limit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka suddenly appears in front of me, making
no sense.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you forgot about that ticket!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Remember New Year's at the start of my senior
year? I won a big prize in that raffle.
choice_data_list: The ticket for the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right! That!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wanted to go there by motorcycle...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd have one by the time the Twinkle
Series wrapped up.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I still don't have one! And we can't just sit
around anymore.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We're running out of time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The ticket expires! If we don't use it soon, it'll be
just scrap paper!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We don't have time to be picky anymore. It's time
to go touring... by train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click clack... Click clack...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ohhh yeah! Let's see what this baby can do!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Wooo! Nice driving, conductor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka whispers out cheers for the train, and it
zooms us to the inn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was a great bath!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The heat just seeped into my bones like fwooshhh! My whole body's warmed up now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm comin' to your room after this.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta talk all about how we tackled that
mountain pass!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not that we did any of the work, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yep. The train kinda stole our thunder on that
one.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! I can't believe we came to a hot spring
on a rattling train, swaying gently while eating
snacks.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's no different than a field trip. I wanted you
right behind me, holdin' tight while we ripped
through those corners on the back of my
motorcycle.
choice_data_list: Why don't we talk about something else?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Oh well, let's talk about our other
memories, I guess!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We've still got plenty of other tales!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka continues to talk merrily while we enjoy a
hot pot with a side of sashimi.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! I really had no clue what to do at the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't given me such good advice, I
would've given up.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And then at the Fan Fest! You told me to keep on
bein' me when we were up on the roof!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wait. You forgot?! You gotta be joking! I was
really moved.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's because of what you said that I... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's suddenly at a loss for words and starts
sobbing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Talking like this made me think... Well, it made
me realize...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You and I have always been touring. I didn't even
notice.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Even without motorcycles, you've always
been ridin' by my side.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And whenever I was about to take a wrong turn or
step on the brakes, you put me back on track!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who told me to keep goin' straight
ahead and not to be afraid.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I would've fallen if I'd been alone. I
might've even given up...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But you were there for me! It's all thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Even if we didn't ride that mountain pass, we've
still got a bunch to talk about. Loads and loads of
stories...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, how annoying! I'm so lame! I wanted us to be
laughin' the night away...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I can't stop these feelings! Aughhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Vodka's always been compassionate
deep down. It looks like, here in this inn with no
one else around, she can't keep up the tough-guy
act.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer... Thanks, partner.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to laugh at how pathetic I'm bein', by
the way!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You'd better not tell anyone about this, though!
The hot spring melted my heart is all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka wears her true feelings on her sleeve all
night and continues to laugh through her tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Vodka and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
